# Michael C. Peterson

> Data & Business Intelligence Analyst and BYU Information Systems student (graduating April 2027) specializing in SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI.

Michael C. Peterson is a Data & BI Analyst at Brevium, a Utah-based healthcare software company focused on patient reactivation. He is pursuing a B.S. in Information Systems (Data Analytics emphasis, STEM) at Brigham Young University with a 3.8 GPA. As a BYU Marriott School of Business teaching assistant, he has taught SQL, Tableau, Excel, HTML/CSS, and VBA to 385+ students. He has maintained Webflow sites serving 10K+ monthly users and restructured 50+ articles for SEO at BYU School of Accountancy.

## Skills

SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL), Python (Pandas), Tableau, Power BI, Advanced Excel, VBA, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Node.js, Webflow, WordPress, AWS, Spanish (fluent)
